CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_blog', false, 'Y13eA45ymAAMsClsMzlepXW0vibNo9wYJ3URwMEeaZs', 'v3.5.0--Y13eA45ymAAMsClsMzlepXW0vibNo9wYJ3URwMEeaZs', 'QOJhpQWPab0Ib9r8JPs6OlE1Z4C6Zdq538t0QWAzkuw'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_blog; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_blog (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "date" VARCHAR, "description" VARCHAR, "draft" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, "extension" VARCHAR, "layout" VARCHAR NULL, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "tags" TEXT NULL, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
UPDATE _content_info SET ready = true WHERE id = 'checksum_blog'; -- meta
